title: myosotis sylvatica var. alpestris
intro: Myosotis sylvatica var. alpestris, also known as alpine forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of alpine forget-me-not include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
